string.name: what_s_new_latest
string.font:
🌟 New "Plus" Flavor: Introduced a premium build flavor with integrated billing and enhanced features. 
🌟 Localization: Added Polish, Russian, and German support; updated Spanish and Portuguese. 
🌟 Improved UX: Reduced frequency of promotional messages for a cleaner experience. 
🌟 Core Updates: Updated Kotlin, Compose, and Media3 to latest versions for better stability. 
🌟 CI/CD: Enhanced release workflow for automated "PLUS" flavor distribution.
